flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California Institute of Technology rose 48% between 2007 and 2010 ($5.5k → $8.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California Institute of Technology rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.7k → $65.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at California Institute of Technology rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.7k → $65.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California Institute of Technology fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (86.2% → 77.1%).
